retrieved_result: How Old Is The Undertaker? As one of the most private and mysterious individuals to ever step inside a WWE ring, fans have naturally wondered just how old The Undertaker is. Though his age should be easily verifiable, it has been disputed over the years. Fans had long believed that the WWE Superstar was born on March 24, 1962
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about The Undertaker's age and not related to IDEs or software development.
